text: Cross-repo edge data model (optional repoId on connections)
description: Extend ConnectionSchema with an optional repoId: defined ⇒ the target aim lives in an external repo. Single code path through value-calc and rendering (no separate externalConnections array). External edges are stored only on the local supported (parent) side; supportedAims stays local-only (the external supporter keeps no back-reference). Thread repoId through create/update/connect paths and persistence.

status.comment: Parked 2026-06-27: design pivoted to REPO-LEVEL links only (aim → whole external repo, {repoId}-only edge, no aimId). This aim's premise — repoId on a connection that targets a SPECIFIC external aim — is superseded. The repo-only data model is a new aim under the rewritten parent e81b11c3. Revive only if deep aim-level links return.
